topArticle.title: Arrests fuel fears among Madagascar’s gen Z protesters that new regime no better than one they overthrew
topArticle.description:
Jubilation is turning to disenchantment as young activists arrested after protest calling for election date to be set
The arrest of several protesters in Madagascar has increased fears among young people that the military regime that took power last year after huge Gen Z demonstrations will be no better than the government it overthrew.
Four Gen Z activists, Herizo Andriamanantena, Miora Rakotomalala, Dina Randrianarisoa and Nomena Ratsihorimanana, were arrested on 12 April, one of their lawyers said, two days after taking part in a protest calling for an election date to be set.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: マダガスカル、新政権への不満募る若者デモ、抗議活動家逮捕で懸念高まる
topArticle.summary: マダガスカルでデモ参加者が逮捕され、若者たちの間で政権交代への失望感が高まっている。

topArticle.title: Kenyan firm sacks more than 1,000 workers after losing Meta contract
topArticle.description:
Meta paused work with Sama last month after allegations about staff viewing private scenes filmed by smart glasses
More than 1,000 low-paid workers in Kenya have been abruptly sacked by an outsourcing company contracted by Meta, in what activists said was a shocking move exposing the precariousness of tech jobs in the global south.
Sama, a company based in Nairobi to which Meta outsourced content moderation and AI training work, announced on Thursday that the workers were being laid off after Meta terminated a contract.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: ケニア企業、Metaとの契約失い1000人超解雇

topArticle.title: Weather tracker: hail covers parts of Tunisia and Algeria like snow
topArticle.description:
Accumulations of up to 3cm deep reported as severe thunderstorms also bring heavy downpours to central Italy
Severe thunderstorms have affected the Mediterranean this week. On Monday, a surface low-pressure system in the Mediterranean in conjunction with an upper air cut-off low, led to thunderstorms over north Africa. Their intensity was aided by the hot precursor conditions.
Algeria and Tunisia were notably affected by the thunderstorms, with some hail accumulation layers as a result. When so much hail forms, it starts to lay down sheets of hail, covering the ground like snow. Hail accumulations of up to 3cm were reported in Oum Ladjoul and Hammam Sokhna in Algeria, and there were hailstones of up to 3cm in diameter in Makthar, Tunisia. Thunderstorms continued in the region through the following day, with further hail accumulations, notably in Ouled Bousmir, Tunisia, where there was a layer about 2cm deep.
 Continue reading...

topArticle.summary: チュニジアとアルジェリアで激しい雷雨が発生し、雪のように積もった雹が一部地域を覆った。

topArticle.title: Air Canada temporarily suspends some flights to New York and other locations
topArticle.description:
Separately, Spirit Airlines reportedly seeks emergency US government funds as Iran war keeps aviation fuel costs high

Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox

Air Canada has announced a temporary suspension of flights from Toronto and Montreal to New York’s John F Kennedy airport, citing rising fuel prices.
The move comes amid growing concerns that airlines worldwide may scale back services as aviation fuel costs climb in the wake of the US and Israel’s ongoing war with Iran, which entered a fragile ceasefire earlier in April. Although Iran announced on Friday that the strait of Hormuz had reopened, helping ease oil prices, fuel costs remain significantly elevated after weeks of disruption.
 Continue reading...

topArticle.title: Pedro Pascal v Pedro Piscal: actor in legal battle with Chilean spirit brand

Pedro Piscal pisco is latest Chilean brand to resemble a Hollywood name – and others have fought off the lawsuits
The actor Pedro Pascal is waging a legal battle against a Chilean pisco merchant who has chosen a cheeky name for his brand of the country’s national spirit: Pedro Piscal.
David Herrera registered the brand name with a Chilean commercial regulator in 2023 and began selling his pisco in off-licences and restaurants.

topArticle.title: 'Every drop of water counts': Fear for the future of Argentina's glaciers
topArticle.description: A controversial law to ease protections for the glaciers has passed, opening the doors for mining.
topArticle.titleJa: 「一滴の水も惜しい」アルゼンチンの氷河の未来への懸念
topArticle.summary: アルゼンチンの氷河保護法が緩和され、鉱業への道が開かれる。氷河の未来を憂慮する声が上がっている。

topArticle.title: Community micro-hydropower plants revolutionise isolated areas of the Dominican Republic
topArticle.description: Community micro-hydropower projects in the DR rely on local leadership to deliver energy from renewable sources to isolated areas excluded from national distribution systems, contributing to reduced greenhouse gas emissions.
topArticle.titleJa: ドミニカ共和国の孤立地域に革命をもたらすコミュニティ小水力発電所
topArticle.summary: ドミニカ共和国では、地域主導の小水力発電が孤立地域に再生可能エネルギーを供給し、温室効果ガス排出削減に貢献しています。

topArticle.title: How Bad Bunny brought the issue of Puerto Rico’s power grid into world view
topArticle.description: Puerto Rico’s electricity system has faced repeated crises since 2017’s Hurricane Maria, which destroyed much of the grid and triggered the longest blackout in modern U.S. history; outages remain routine.
topArticle.titleJa: バッド・バニーはいかにしてプエルトリコの電力網問題を世界に知らしめたか
topArticle.summary: ハリケーン・マリア以降、プエルトリコの電力網は危機に瀕しており、停電が日常化しています。バッド・バニーがこの問題を世界に提起しました。

topArticle.title: Ecuador’s Netanyahu and Trump supporters target Ecuadorian–Iranian Cultural Center
topArticle.description: Wars no longer have defined frontlines. Battlefields can be anywhere those in power decide that a neighbor, due to their faith, ethnicity, or background, is an enemy.
topArticle.titleJa: エクアドルのネタニヤフとトランプ支持者がエクアドル・イラン文化センターを標的に
topArticle.summary: エクアドルで、宗教や民族を理由にした紛争が文化センターを標的にしており、現代の戦争の様相を呈しています。

topArticle.title: Concerns grow as Jamaica ends Cuban medical programme
topArticle.description: Terminating the decades-old programme that brought hundreds of Cuban medical personnel to its shores is an unusual move, especially for a programme that had been running smoothly for 50 years.
topArticle.titleJa: キューバ医療プログラム終了でジャマイカの懸念高まる
topArticle.summary: 50年間順調に続いていたキューバからの医療従事者受け入れプログラムがジャマイカで終了し、懸念が高まっています。

topArticle.title: How far-right ‘fear tactics’ affect girls seeking legal abortion in Brazil
topArticle.description: Fighting a resolution to ensure access to legal abortion for girls under 14 is the latest example of abortion rights being used as a political tool by conservatives in the country
topArticle.titleJa: 極右の「恐怖戦術」がブラジルで合法的な中絶を求める少女たちにどう影響するか
topArticle.summary: ブラジルでは、14歳未満の少女への合法的な中絶アクセスを保障する決議案に対し、保守派が政治的手段として反対運動を展開しています。

topArticle.title: Nawat language now has its own Wikipedia
topArticle.description: The New Year brought an exciting announcement: the official launch of Wikipedia in Nawat, the result of several years of training and community-building across communities in El Salvador and beyond.
topArticle.titleJa: ナワット語、独自のウィキペディアを持つ
topArticle.summary: エルサルバドルなどで数年間の訓練とコミュニティ構築を経て、ナワット語のウィキペディアが正式に開設されました。

topArticle.title: Healing a region: How healthcare is bringing peace to Arauca, Colombia
topArticle.description: Reliable, inclusive healthcare does more than treat illness. It can function as social glue that softens community strain and transforms clinics into safe spaces for everyone.
topArticle.titleJa: 地域を癒す：医療がコロンビアのアラウカに平和をもたらす方法
topArticle.summary: コロンビアのアラウカでは、信頼できる包括的な医療が、地域社会の緊張を和らげ、診療所を安全な場所へと変えています。

topArticle.title: Drone footage shows huge Malaysian coastal village fire
topArticle.description: Thousands of people have been displaced after a fire destroyed around 1,000 homes in Malaysia's Sabah state.
topArticle.titleJa: ドローン映像が捉えたマレーシアの巨大沿岸村の火災
topArticle.summary: マレーシアのサバ州で約1000戸の家屋を焼失した火災により、数千人が避難しました。

topArticle.title: Marcos says key suspect in Philippine corruption firestorm arrested
topArticle.description: Ex-MP Zaldy Co has been detained in Prague, ending months of hiding.
topArticle.titleJa: マルコス大統領、フィリピン汚職スキャンダルの重要容疑者の逮捕を発表
topArticle.summary: 元国会議員のザルディ・コ氏がプラハで拘束され、数ヶ月にわたる逃亡生活に終止符が打たれました。

topArticle.title: Kazakhstan initiates dispute regarding Indonesia duties on imported hot-rolled steel coils
topArticle.description: Kazakhstan has requested WTO dispute consultations with Indonesia regarding additional ad valorem import duties on hot-rolled steel coils originating from Kazakhstan. The request was circulated to WTO members on 15 April. This is the first time that Kazakhstan has brought a case as a complainant to the WTO dispute settlement system.
topArticle.titleJa: カザフスタン、インドネシアの輸入熱延鋼板関税をWTOで争議提起
topArticle.summary: カザフスタンは、インドネシアが輸入熱延鋼板に課した関税について、WTOに争議解決手続きを要請しました。

topArticle.title: Viet Nam submits request to join Expansion of the Information Technology Agreement
topArticle.description: Viet Nam has submitted a request to join the 2015 Expansion of the Information Technology Agreement (ITA II), the Chair of the Committee of Participants on the Expansion of Trade in Information Technology Products, Mr Andrei Rusu of Romania, informed members at a meeting on 15 April. Viet Nam, already a member of the 1996 ITA, which eliminates duties on 203 IT products, intends to submit its draft tariff commitments in due course to cover a further 201 products under the ITA II.
topArticle.titleJa: ベトナム、情報技術協定（ITA）拡大への参加を申請
topArticle.summary: ベトナムは、情報技術協定（ITA II）の2015年拡大への参加を申請しました。

topArticle.title: Morocco launches safeguard investigation on certain types of rice
topArticle.description: On 13 April 2026, Morocco notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards that it had initiated on the same day (i.e. 13 April 2026) a safeguard investigation on imports of certain types of rice.
topArticle.titleJa: モロッコ、米輸入に関するセーフガード調査を開始
topArticle.summary: モロッコは2026年4月13日、米輸入に関するセーフガード調査を開始したとWTOに通知しました。
